name: Укиё-э гравюра — Зоро Ророноа
moment: Roronoa Zoro stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal three-quarter view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 78% of frame height, planted forward in a heavy braced stance with both boots firmly on a rocky outcrop, torso twisted slightly toward the viewer, his short vivid green hair and his dark haramaki wrapped around his waist over an open dark green haori-style coat rendered as flat poster-ink layers with visible wood-grain texture running through every large color field as if printed from a carved woodblock (mokuhanga), a stern hardened warrior's face with a calm resolute expression, one white katana blade (Wado Ichimonji, plain unadorned white handle wrap) gripped crosswise in his teeth, one katana held low in his right hand, one katana sheathed at his left hip with its hilt gripped ready by his other hand, all three blades rendered in flat steel-grey with a single carved highlight edge like a printed woodblock key-line. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure, no floating alternate pose anywhere in the composition. Behind him a monumental ukiyo-e wave modeled on Hokusai's Great Wave curls up and over the upper third of the canvas, its claw-like foam fingers rendered in the same flat woodblock-printed indigo-and-white layers, cresting just above his raised blade tip but never overlapping his face, small Hokusai-style cloud-band of pale grey mist sitting low behind his boots. Two small round vermilion hanko-style stamp cartouches (artist/publisher seal cartouches, blank decorative seal-marks with a simple geometric mon-crest, no invented kanji beyond the ones specified elsewhere on the print) sit in the upper corners of the canvas as traditional ukiyo-e print border ornaments.
art_style: японская гравюра укиё-э (мокухан, стиль школы Кацусика Хокусай/Утагава Куниёси): плоские заливки без градиентов, всюду читается фактура деревянного оттиска (грубое зерно доски, лёгкие непропечатанные разрывы по краям крупных плашек), контур фигуры — толстая продавленная чёрная линия как от резной доски, вода и облака построены классическими стилизованными завитками-когтями, лёгкое смещение цветных слоёв друг относительно друга (offset misregistration) имитирует ручную печать в несколько прогонов
typography: Main phrase 'THREE SWORD STYLE' is set inside a long horizontal woodblock-printed title cartouche (a rectangular ruled panel like the title cartouche on a classic ukiyo-e sheet) positioned along the lower third of the canvas beneath Zoro's boots, cartouche fill flat aged-parchment cream with a thick carved black double-rule border (outer rule 0.03x cap-height, inner rule 0.015x cap-height, gap between rules 0.02x cap-height), the phrase itself set in a bold hand-carved brush-caps display face (uneven carved stroke edges, like hand-cut woodblock lettering, NOT a clean digital sans), fill solid sumi-ink black, cap-height 0.08x figure width, word gap 0.05x cap-height so all three words read clearly separated, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column ゾロ (Zoro, his name) is placed as a traditional red hanko-stamp cartouche in the lower-right margin beside his trailing leg, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a bold flat vermilion-red carved stamp-column matching classic ukiyo-e artist-seal style, glyph size 0.075x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly two glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: indigo blue, sumi-ink black, vermilion red, aged parchment cream, steel-grey blades, muted ochre wave-foam
chroma_note: ВНИМАНИЕ: у Зоро ЯРКО-ЗЕЛЁНЫЕ волосы (канон) — зелёный хромакей убил бы их при вырезке, поэтому хромакей для сведения фона на этом принте — СИНИЙ (chroma: blue), а не зелёный.

name: Витраж — Тандзиро Камадо
moment: Tanjiro Kamado stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 76% of frame height, centered directly beneath the peak of a pointed gothic arch, standing in a still, upright half-turned stance, torso facing the viewer, head turned slightly to one side, his messy dark red hair catching light as flat luminous glass-segment highlights, his kind gentle eyes calm and warm, wearing his canon green-and-black checkered haori over a black uniform, small red hanafuda earrings visible at both ears, both hands loose at his sides in stillness, from his upper back four flowing water-blue ribbons of energy extend outward and upward like radiating light-rays, each ribbon rendered as an elongated shard of glowing cyan-blue glass-segment fanning symmetrically behind his shoulders, echoing the stained-glass ray motif of his Water Breathing technique rather than looking like a weapon in motion. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, the water-blue ribbons are a separate back-appendage and do not replace or duplicate his limbs, no extra or duplicated arms/legs, no second figure anywhere in the composition. The whole scene sits inside a tall gothic stained-glass window frame filling the entire canvas: a lead-came (thick black outline) traces every color segment exactly like real leaded glass, the window's pointed arch top is echoed by a smaller tracery rose-medallion directly above his head, the left half of the background rendered in deep glowing teals and blacks, the right half rendered in warm glowing ambers and soft creams, the two halves meeting on the strict vertical centerline behind him — a calm light/warm duality split down the center of the whole panel.
art_style: готический церковный витраж: толстые чёрные свинцовые контуры (came) вокруг каждого цветного сегмента, сами сегменты — плоские насыщенные полупрозрачные заливки будто подсвеченные изнутри, никаких мягких растушёвок, стрельчатая арка и розетка-медальон как архитектурное обрамление, спокойная светлая дуальность читается по всей композиции
typography: Main phrase 'SET YOUR HEART ABLAZE' is set inside a narrow horizontal leaded-glass banner-segment spanning the width of the arch directly below the small rose-medallion tracery above his head (a proper stained-glass banner strip, not a floating overlay), banner fill flat deep-teal glass with the same thick black lead-came border as the rest of the window (0.03x cap-height), the phrase set in a tall gothic blackletter display face (narrow, high-contrast, pointed serifs matching the arch's gothic architecture), fill luminous pale-gold glass color with a thin black lead outline around every letter consistent with the came style, cap-height 0.07x figure width (reduced to fit four words legibly across the narrow banner), word gap 0.045x cap-height, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column タンジロウ (Tanjiro, his given name) is set as a small leaded glass panel in the lower-left margin of the window frame beside his leg, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as bold flat crimson glass matching his hanafuda earrings with a thin black lead outline, glyph size 0.065x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly five glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: deep teal blue, forest green checkered haori, warm amber, pale gold light, crimson red earring accent, black lead-came outline
chroma_note: ВНИМАНИЕ: у оригинального рецепта (Канэки) была крупная изумрудно-зелёная область стекла, поэтому там был chroma: blue. Здесь у Тандзиро палитра сдвинута на тёмно-бирюзовый/тёплый янтарь БЕЗ насыщенного зелёного стекла — зелёный хромакей безопасен (chroma: green), но при визуальной проверке сверить, что фон реально чисто зелёный, а не сливается с бирюзовыми сегментами.

name: Психоделика 70-х — Луффи Gear 5
moment: Monkey D. Luffy in his Gear 5 Nika form stands full figure, SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only (no second view, no model-sheet, no alternate angle anywhere on the print), the figure occupying 77% of frame height, his straw hat resting on his back by its cord, both of his eyes wide open with a huge wide toothy grin exactly like his canon Sun God Nika expression, his hair, skin-tone highlights and entire outfit turned bright canon white (Gear 5 signature all-white color-shift), standing in a loose confident bouncy stance with weight on one hip, one hand raised beside his head in a relaxed open-palm gesture, the other hand resting loosely at his side, his shorts and vest rendered with liquid melting poster-groove distortion at the edges (fabric folds bending into soft swirling psychedelic ripples rather than straight cel-shaded creases) while his face and anatomy remain clearly readable and correctly proportioned. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or duplicate pose anywhere in the composition. Around him, concentric liquid spirals in vibrating complementary colors radiate outward from behind his raised hand exactly like a 1970s concert poster's optical-vibration rings, small stylized puffy white clouds drifting through the outer spiral bands as a nod to his Nika cloud motif, the spiral bands warping slightly around his silhouette without ever obscuring his face or hands, a soft rainbow halo-glow rimming his whole figure where the spiral meets his outline.
art_style: психоделия концертных афиш 1970-х (в духе Wes Wilson/Victor Moscoso): плавящиеся жидкие контуры, вибрирующие дополнительные цвета на стыках плашек создающие оптическую вибрацию, спиральные концентрические узоры вместо фона, никакой чёткой прямой линии — всё слегка перетекает и закругляется
typography: Main phrase 'SUN GOD' is rendered as a classic liquid-melting groove-poster lettering block (letterforms bulging, dripping and bending into each other's space like hand-lettered 1970s psychedelic type, each letter a different vibrating color from a tight rainbow-groove palette so the word itself pulses optically) arcing gently across the lower third of the canvas beneath Luffy's feet, following the innermost curve of the spiral background, cap-height 0.11x figure width, word gap 0.06x cap-height kept legible despite the liquid distortion so both words read clearly, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column ニカ (Nika, his transformed form's name) is placed in the upper-right margin beside his raised hand, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered in the same liquid-groove style but simplified for legibility (letterforms softly rounded, not overly distorted), fill glowing sunflower-yellow matching the sun motif, thin magenta halo-outline, glyph size 0.08x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly two glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.045x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: hot magenta, electric sky-blue, sunflower yellow, deep violet, tangerine orange, optic-white highlight
chroma_note: ВНИМАНИЕ: Gear 5 Луффи целиком БЕЛЫЙ (волосы/кожа-хайлайты/одежда) — на белом персонаже держать зелёный хромакей чистым от белых засветок по краям силуэта, при вырезке проверить кромку внимательнее обычного.
